reportWorkResponse.body:
<!doctype html>
<html lang="zh-cn">

<head>
	<meta charset="UTF-8">
	<meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="ie=edge">
	<title></title>
	<!--指令单完工报工-->	
	<script>		
		var loadScript = function(url, placeBody) {
			function loadUrlContent(url, successCallback, errorCallback) {
				var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
				xhr.open("GET", url, false);
				if ("overrideMimeType" in xhr) {
					xhr.overrideMimeType("text/plain");
				}
				xhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
					if (xhr.readyState === 4) {
					if (xhr.status === 0 || xhr.status === 200) {
						successCallback(xhr.responseText);
					} else {
						errorCallback && errorCallback();
						throw new Error("Could not load " + url);
					}
					}
				};
				return xhr.send(null);
			}
			var isChrome = window.chrome && /Chrome/.test(navigator.userAgent) && /Google Inc/.test(navigator.vendor);
			if (!isChrome) {
				url += '-es5';
			}
			url += '.js?v=' + Math.random();
			
			loadUrlContent(url, function(content){
				var parentEl = document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0];
				var s = document.createElement('script');
				s.text = content;
				parentEl.appendChild(s);
			});
		};
	</script>

	<!-- 自定义代码，在custom对应目录下 -->
	<!-- head.html--start -->
	
	<!-- head.html--end -->
	<script>
		
		
		document.write("<script src='/greenDill/static/WOM/procReport/procReport/outPutCommonTaskEdit/i18n-value.js?" + Math.random() + "' ><\/script>");
	</script>
	<script type="text/javascript">
		var pageConfig = {
			"prefix": "/msService",// url前缀
			"viewCode": "WOM_1.0.0_procReport_outPutCommonTaskEdit", //  视图编码
			"entityCode":"WOM_1.0.0_procReport",// 实体编码
			"menuCode": "WOM_1.0.0_procReport_outPutCommonTaskEdit",
			"viewName": "指令单完工报工",// 视图名称
			"viewType": "EDIT",// 视图类型
			"modelCode": "WOM_1.0.0_procReport_ProcReport",// 模型编码
			"moduleCode": "WOM_1.0.0",// 模块编码
			"isMain":true,// 主模型
			"permissionCode":null, // 视图权限操作码（主要参照视图使用）


			"showType": "SINGLE",// 视图展示类型
			"modelAlias": "procReport",// 模型别名
